description.p: You follow the open road as many legendary Vagari did before you. Answering to no guildmaster or distant authority, you are guided by your own code and conscience. You defend those the Hunter’s Guild has overlooked, pursue goals others would forbid, and uncover creatures and mysteries unknown to most.

ul.li: Skill Proficiencies: Survival; Choose one from Insight, Persuasion, Stealth
Tool Proficiencies: One type of artisan's tools, vehicles (land)

Equipment: A set of artisan's tools (one of your choice), traveler's clothes, a hunting knife, a worn regional map, a small trophy taken from a creature that threatened a village, and a pouch containing 10 gp

b.big: As a member of the Vagari Ryoshi you are granted additional features:

setters.set: Surival, Insight/Persuasion/Stealth, 1 artisan tool, vehicles (land), 1 language

select.name: Personality Trait
select.item: I keep a record of every creature I kill and why it had to die.
I treat every journey as though someone's life depends on it.
I distrust anyone who needs a title before doing the right thing.
I treat every hunt like a puzzle. Charging in before understanding the creature is how hunters become corpses.
I tell exaggerated stories about my hunts, though the truth is usually dangerous enough.
I leave warnings, trail marks, and occaisonally useful supplies behind for the next traveler.
I always ask who benefits from a monster's death before accepting a hunt.
I respect monsters that defend their territory more than hunters who invade it for gold.

select.name: Ideal
select.item: Mercy. Rules exist to protect people, not prevent them from receiving hekp. (Good)
Freedom. No faction or noble owns the road, the forest, or the right to survive. (Chaotic)
Responsibility. Independence means accepting the consequnces of every choice. (Lawful)
Exhilaration. The risks are real, but so is the thrill. There's no life I would rather lead. (Chaotic)
Stewardship. A true hunter protects the land as well as the people living upon it. (Neutral)
Justice. When law serves only the powerful, conscience must take its place. (Good)

select.name: Bond
select.item: I owe my freedom to smugglers and villagers who hid me from the guild.
I swore never to let another community be ignored simply because they cannot affored a proper hunting contract.
I am searching for another Vagari who broke the code.
The Hunter's Guild holds someone I care about responsible for my crimes. I must clear their name.
I believe one monster protects the frontier from something far worse, and I will not allow anyone to hunt it.
The Helix Commission is an abomination. I will destroy it.

select.name: Flaw
select.item: I conceal information when I believe others will make the wrong decision with it.
I cannot ignore a cry for help, even if I suspect its a trap.
I keep trophies that could reveal what I am.
I grow jealous of those who succeed where I failed.
I consider myself responsible for every regoin I pass through and take on more problems than I can possibly solve.
I secretly enjoy being feared almost as much as I enjoy being respected.
